raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is on top of box_1 and attached to it; the left end-effector can reach the top surface of box_2 without colliding with the table edge or the right arm.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is constrained against box_1 to prevent sudden separation or tipping during detachment and lifting of box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "There is sufficient clearance on the left and right sides of box_1 for both end-effectors to establish lateral contact; box_2 remains stabilized so it cannot shift while force is applied to separate the attachment.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely clamped by both end-effectors and controlled off the table surface."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is held securely; a clear placement region exists on the table such that box_1 can be set down without contacting box_2 or the robot arms.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 (the darker box) is placed back on the table under full robot control, completing the pickup-and-set-down manipulation while maintaining stability of the attached assembly."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is on top of box_1 and attached to it; the left end-effector can reach the top surface of box_2 without colliding with the table edge or the right arm.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is constrained against box_1 to prevent sudden separation or tipping during detachment and lifting of box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: There is sufficient clearance on the left and right sides of box_1 for both end-effectors to establish lateral contact; box_2 remains stabilized so it cannot shift while force is applied to separate the attachment.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely clamped by both end-effectors and controlled off the table surface.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is held securely; a clear placement region exists on the table such that box_1 can be set down without contacting box_2 or the robot arms.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 (the darker box) is placed back on the table under full robot control, completing the pickup-and-set-down manipulation while maintaining stability of the attached assembly.
